productName: SusPENded Signature Resin Disposable, Lost OG - 1g
description: A grab-and-go hybrid disposable of Lost OG, the simplest way to vape: flavorful, portable, and zero setup required. Grab-and-go convenience, a pungent earthy-pine and fuel aroma with a strong, classic, relaxing feel, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
